{"rule":"LOG_IN","sentence":"^\\QA) No — the app IS the landing page; redirect to login/dashboard directly\nB) Yes — a simple landing page explaining the app, then enter\nC) Yes — a beautiful marketing page, with the app at /app or /dashboard\nD) Later — V1 just needs the app running\\E$"}
{"rule":"WHITESPACE_RULE","sentence":"^\\Qcircalog.app          → Landing/coming soon page (V1), evolves into full marketing page (V2+)\ncircalog.app/log      → The PWA app itself (always)\nRoot domain is the public face of CircaLog\nApp lives permanently at /log — clean, descriptive, never changes\\E$"}
{"rule":"ENGLISH_WORD_REPEAT_BEGINNING_RULE","sentence":"^\\QYour choice.\\E$"}
{"rule":"ENGLISH_WORD_REPEAT_BEGINNING_RULE","sentence":"^\\QItems marked 🟢 are independent and can be started at any time.\\E$"}
{"rule":"HELL","sentence":"^\\QCreating or editing multiple files in one cohesive task\nSearching for a pattern, function, or import across the entire codebase\nComplex refactors that span components, hooks, utilities, and types together\nDatabase migrations or Supabase schema changes\nRunning tests or linting passes\nAnything requiring shell access or process execution\\E$"}
{"rule":"WHITESPACE_RULE","sentence":"^\\QURL Structure\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q       → Landing/coming soon page (V1), full marketing page (V2+)\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q   → The PWA app — permanent, never changes\\E$"}
{"rule":"A_INFINITIVE","sentence":"^\\QAlways use \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q for moving tracked files — otherwise Git sees a delete + a new untracked file instead of a rename, and the file history is lost.\\E$"}
{"rule":"OF_ANY_OF","sentence":"^\\QDo not edit the contents of any of these files.\\E$"}
